headline: Vertex Pharmaceuticals price target raised to $612 from $596 at Morgan Stanley
summary: Morgan Stanley raised the firm’s price target on Vertex Pharmaceuticals (VRTX) to $612 from $596 and keeps an Overweight rating on the shares. The firm adjusted models among its biopharma coverage for IQVIA trends as well as intra-quarter updates ahead of Q1 earnings reporting from the group.Easter Sale - 70% Off TipRanksUnlock hedge fund-level data and powerful investing tools for smarter, sharper decisions Discover top-performing stock ideas and upgrade to a portfolio of market leaders with Sm
